title: `Avviym #5761
definition:
Avim = "ruins"

 n pr m
 1) a people among the early inhabitants of Palestine located in the
    southwest corner of the seacoast

 n pr loc
 2) a city in Benjamin
nasbUsage:
Definition: Avim = "ruins"

 n pr m
 1) a people among the early inhabitants of Palestine located in the
    southwest corner of the seacoast

 n pr loc
 2) a city in Benjamin

    NASB:  a city in Benjamin, also a people on the S.W. coast of the Mediterranean Sea
